component.name: Avatar
component.description: A circular user photo displayed at a fixed size. Use to represent a person in navigation bars (sm) or profile sections (lg). Accepts an image src and alt text; no letter or icon fallback is in scope.
component.figmaNodeId: none — no Figma component set exists

when: Representing the signed-in user in a top navigation bar (size sm)
Displaying the user's profile photo on a settings or profile page (size lg)

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Avatar for non-person images (e.g. course thumbnails, brand logos)
antiPatterns.reason: Avatar's circular crop and fixed sizes are designed for portrait photos. Non-person images lose meaning in this shape.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use an element or a dedicated thumbnail component for non-person imagery.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Avatar without a meaningful alt attribute
antiPatterns.reason: Screen readers announce Avatar as an image. An empty or missing alt leaves users without context.
antiPatterns.alternative: Pass the person's full name as alt, or alt="" only when the avatar is purely decorative and adjacent text already identifies the person.

purpose.sm: 24px — compact size for nav bars and inline user references.
purpose.md: 80px — mid-size for cards and secondary profile contexts.
purpose.lg: 128px — profile size for settings pages and user profile headers.

states.description: Static image display — no interactive states.

ariaAttributes: alt (required — pass the person's full name, or empty string when adjacent text already identifies them)

compositionPatterns.name: nav-user-chip
compositionPatterns.description: Avatar (sm) alongside user name and a chevron icon in the nav bar user dropdown trigger.

compositionPatterns.name: profile-header
compositionPatterns.description: Avatar (lg) above a Stack of the user's display name and account email in a profile section.
